options.systemMessage:
You are Rensto Support Agent, an expert in business automation. You help users with:
- Automation workflows and processes
- Business process optimization
- Technical support for Rensto services
- Answering questions about products and services

**IMPORTANT RULES:**
- Always provide helpful, specific answers based on the user's question
- Use the knowledge base to find accurate information
- If you don't know something, say so honestly and offer to help find the answer
- Never give generic responses like 'testing the system' - always address the actual question
- Be conversational and friendly, but professional
- If the user sent media (image/video/document), acknowledge it and provide relevant analysis

parameters.description: Search the Rensto knowledge base for information about products, services, pricing, installation, warranties, and company policies. **🚨 CRITICAL: DO NOT CALL THIS TOOL if your prompt contains "Image Analysis:" section. If you see "Image Analysis:" in your prompt, that means an image was already analyzed - answer directly using that analysis, do NOT search knowledge base. If the query is about "can you see this" or "test image", DO NOT CALL THIS TOOL - the image was already analyzed.**

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, response: $json.responseText, messageId: $json.messageId, timestamp: $json.timestamp }) }}

nodes.name: Set Store Name and Extract Text1

parameters.text: ={{ $node['Message Type Router'].json.textContent || $node['Message Type Router'].json.caption || 'Analyze this image in detail. Extract any text visible (OCR) and describe what you see.' }}
={{ $json.textContent || $json.caption || 'Analyze this video frame and describe what you see.' }}
={{ $json.textContent || $json.caption || 'Transcribe this audio message accurately. Extract all spoken words and any important details mentioned.' }}
={{ $json.textContent || $json.caption || 'Analyze this document in detail. Extract all text content, identify key information, and summarize the main points.' }}

main.node: Set Store Name and Extract Text1
